allow: Bash(sed -i "s/import { useTripStore } from ''..\\/store\\/tripStore'';/import { useCurrentTripData } from ''..\\/store\\/tripStore'';/g" src/pages/Activities.tsx src/pages/Budget.tsx src/pages/CarRental.tsx src/pages/Checklist.tsx src/pages/Dashboard.tsx src/pages/Flights.tsx src/pages/Hotels.tsx src/pages/Itinerary.tsx)

Bash(sed -i "s/useTripStore\(\)/useCurrentTripData\(\)/g" src/pages/Activities.tsx src/pages/Budget.tsx src/pages/CarRental.tsx src/pages/Checklist.tsx src/pages/Dashboard.tsx src/pages/Flights.tsx src/pages/Hotels.tsx src/pages/Itinerary.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/className=""p-6 space-y-6""/className=""p-3 sm:p-6 space-y-4 sm:space-y-6""/g' src/pages/Dashboard.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/className=""p-6 space-y-5""/className=""p-3 sm:p-6 space-y-4 sm:space-y-5""/g' src/pages/Budget.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/className=""p-8 space-y-10""/className=""p-4 sm:p-8 space-y-8 sm:space-y-10""/g' src/pages/Report.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/className=""grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-6""/className=""grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mb-5""/g' src/pages/Report.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/className=""grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 text-center""/className=""grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 text-center""/g' src/pages/Report.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's/className=""grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mt-8""/className=""grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3 mt-6""/g' src/pages/Report.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's|<div className=""overflow-x-auto"">|<div className=""overflow-x-auto -mx-3 sm:mx-0"">|g' src/pages/Flights.tsx src/pages/Budget.tsx)
Bash(sed -i 's|<table className=""w-full text-sm"">|<table className=""w-full text-sm min-w-max"">|g' src/pages/Flights.tsx src/pages/Budget.tsx)
